positive: A highly detailed, stylized repeating pattern featuring celestial motifs: crescent moons, stylized constellations, geometric stars, and flowing, vine-like galactic tendrils. The artwork should employ a neo-art nouveau etching aesthetic with thick black outlines and stark negative space. Limited palette of deep sapphire blue, antique gold, and off-white. Composition is centralized and radial, designed for seamless textile printing. Strong, graphic contrast, elegant silhouette, symmetrical balance. Studio shot, vector graphic quality, high fidelity illustration.
negative: blur, smudge, watermark, signature, messy, noise, low detail, blurry lines, text, illegible, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, jpeg artifacts
